zh.Vicaire, Ille-et-Vilaine, Bretagne, Fran: 法國布列塔尼易爾-吉維拉
zh.Fourgeres, Rennes, Ille-et-Vilaine, Bret: 法國布列塔尼易爾-吉維拉雷斯
zh.Vitre, Brittany, France: 法國布列塔尼易爾-吉維拉維特雷
zh.lifeSummary: 當Riwallon de Vitré, Vicarius de Vitré, Lord of Vitré and Aubroy於0980年出生在法國布列塔尼易爾-吉維拉維特雷時，他的父親Martin de Rennes42歲，母親Salomé de León43歲。他於從0975年到1005年與Génergaude d'Aubrey de la Vicaire在法國布列塔尼易爾-吉維拉雷斯維特雷-斯特結婚。他們至少是2個兒子的父母。他去世於1040年在法國享年60歲。

zh-hans.Vicaire, Ille-et-Vilaine, Bretagne, Fran: 法国布列塔尼易爾-吉維拉
zh-hans.Fourgeres, Rennes, Ille-et-Vilaine, Bret: 法国布列塔尼易爾-吉維拉雷斯
zh-hans.Vitre, Brittany, France: 法国布列塔尼易爾-吉維拉維特雷
zh-hans.lifeSummary: 当Riwallon de Vitré, Vicarius de Vitré, Lord of Vitré and Aubroy于0980年出生在法国布列塔尼易爾-吉維拉維特雷时，他的父亲Martin de Rennes42岁，母亲Salomé de León43岁。他于从0975年到1005年与Génergaude d'Aubrey de la Vicaire在法国布列塔尼易爾-吉維拉雷斯維特雷-斯特结婚。他们至少是2个儿子的父母。他去世于1040年在法国享年60岁。

nameMeanings.name: de
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of American Family Names © Patrick Hanks 2003, 2006.
meanings: Some characteristic forenames:  Indian Dilip, Anirban, Gopal, Alok, Anindya, Arunava, Asit, Asok, Dibyendu, Goutam, Indra, Indranil.
Indian: variant of   Dey  .

variants.name: Dey
meanings: Some characteristic forenames:  Indian Ashit, Indu, Naina, Partha, Soumya, Ajit, Anjan, Anjana, Anup, Arjun, Arun, Ashim.
English, Scottish, and Welsh: variant of   Day  .
German: topographic name from a field name in North Rhine-Westphalia, denoting a sizeable piece of land, from Middle Low German dē ‘thigh’ (referring to the shape of the property).

nameMeanings.name: Vitré,
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of American Family Names © Patrick Hanks 2003, 2006.
meanings: Hispanic (mainly Mexico and Argentina): adaptation of a surname such as Greek   Mitropoulos   and Italian   Mitri  .
Albanian and Romanian: from the personal name Mitre, a short form of Albanian Dhimitër, Romanian Dumitru, from classical Greek Dēmētrios (see Dimitris ).

variants.name: Mitropoulos
meanings: Greek: patronymic from the personal name Mitros + the ending -poulos (from Latin pullus ‘nestling, chick’), which occurs chiefly in the Peloponnese. Compare Metropoulos .

nameMeanings.name: de
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of American Family Names © Patrick Hanks 2003, 2006.
meanings: Some characteristic forenames:  Indian Dilip, Anirban, Gopal, Alok, Anindya, Arunava, Asit, Asok, Dibyendu, Goutam, Indra, Indranil.
Indian: variant of   Dey  .

variants.name: Dey
meanings: Some characteristic forenames:  Indian Ashit, Indu, Naina, Partha, Soumya, Ajit, Anjan, Anjana, Anup, Arjun, Arun, Ashim.
English, Scottish, and Welsh: variant of   Day  .
German: topographic name from a field name in North Rhine-Westphalia, denoting a sizeable piece of land, from Middle Low German dē ‘thigh’ (referring to the shape of the property).

nameMeanings.name: Vitré,
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of American Family Names © Patrick Hanks 2003, 2006.
meanings: Hispanic (mainly Mexico and Argentina): adaptation of a surname such as Greek   Mitropoulos   and Italian   Mitri  .
Albanian and Romanian: from the personal name Mitre, a short form of Albanian Dhimitër, Romanian Dumitru, from classical Greek Dēmētrios (see Dimitris ).

variants.name: Mitropoulos
meanings: Greek: patronymic from the personal name Mitros + the ending -poulos (from Latin pullus ‘nestling, chick’), which occurs chiefly in the Peloponnese. Compare Metropoulos .

nameMeanings.name: Lord
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of American Family Names © Patrick Hanks 2003, 2006.
meanings: English: nickname from Middle English laford, louerd, lord ‘lord, master’ (Old English hlāford), perhaps given to a someone who played the part of the lord or master of ceremonies in festival games.
Irish: adoption of the English name (see 1 above) as a translation of the main element of Gaelic Ó Tighearnaigh (see Tierney ) and Mac Thighearnáin (see McKiernan ).
Americanized form of French Laure, a variant of the personal name Laur 3.

variants.name: Tierney
meanings: Some characteristic forenames:  Irish Brendan, Eamon, John Patrick, Brigid, Clodagh, Kieran, Michael Sean, Siobhan.

Irish: shortened form of O'Tierney, an Anglicized form of Gaelic Ó Tíghearnaigh ‘descendant of Tighearnach’, a byname meaning ‘lord, master’. The Gaelic name is sometimes ‘translated’ as English Lord . Compare Tiernan .

variants.name: Lords
meanings: English: variant of Lord , with post-medieval excrescent -s. This surname is rare in Britain.

nameMeanings.name: of
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of American Family Names © Patrick Hanks 2003, 2006.
meanings: Some characteristic forenames:  Korean Kyong, Kyong Suk, Young, Chae, Chi Young, Hang, Kil, Rin, Sang Hun, Chang, Chong, Insoo, Kum, Sun Young, Yom, Young Hwan.  Cambodian Kiwan, Oeurn, Phoeun, Pich, Saroeuth, Seung, Sophath, Sophea, Yoeun, Phan, Son.  Indian Shanti, Harendra.
Indian (Uttar Pradesh): Brahmin name, from Sanskrit om, the Hindu sacred and mystic syllable uttered at the beginning of prayers.
Cambodian: written ឱម, corresponding to the exclamation of solemn affirmation, of Sanskrit origin (see 1 above), chanted by Buddhist monks.

variants.name: Oum
meanings: Some characteristic forenames:  Southeast Asian Heang, Hye, Kam, Kan, Kheng, Khin, Kun, Sang, Sok, Phong, Yom, Yoo, Youn, Cuong, Phal, Samnang, Tin.  Cambodian Sokha, Chheang, Choeun, Moeun, Roeun, Sambath, Samoeun, Savuth, Soeun, Sopheap.
Cambodian: written អ៊ុំ, from a Khmer word denoting an elder sibling of one's parent (i.e. ‘uncle’ or ‘aunt’). Compare   Om   3 and   Um   2.

nameMeanings.name: Vitré
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of American Family Names © Patrick Hanks 2003, 2006.
meanings: Italian (Sicily; Vitrò): variant of Vetro .

variants.name: Vetro
meanings: Some characteristic forenames:  Italian Salvatore, Rocco, Angelo, Antonio, Armonda, Vincenzo.
Italian (southern, mainly Sicily):
variant of   Vetere  .

nameMeanings.name: and
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of American Family Names © Patrick Hanks 2003, 2006.
meanings: Altered form of French Canadian Hénault or directly of French Hunault (see Henault 2).
Catalan (Añó): Castilianized form of Anyó, probably from the old personal name Annone.
Japanese: variant of   Anno  .

variants.name: Anno
meanings: Some characteristic forenames:  Japanese Masayuki, Tadashi, Yoshito.
Japanese: written 安野 ‘peaceful plain’. This surname is rare in Japan proper, and may have originated in the Ryūkyū Islands, where it is pronounced   Ano  .

variants.name: Henault
meanings: Some characteristic forenames:  French Armand, Andre, Emile, Lucien, Martial, Pierre, Camille, Fernand, Laurier, Monique, Normand, Philippe.
French (Hénault): from the ancient Germanic personal name Haginwald, composed of the elements hagin ‘enclosure, protected place’ and wald ‘power, authority’.
Altered form (Hénault) of French Hunault: from the ancient Germanic personal name Hunwald, composed of the elements hun ‘bear cub’ and wald ‘power, authority’. Compare Ano and Eno .

nameMeanings.name: Aubroy
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of American Family Names © Patrick Hanks 2003, 2006.
meanings: English: from the Middle English male personal name Albry, Aubry, or Aubery, a borrowing of Old French Alberi, Aubri (from ancient Germanic Alberic, which is composed of the elements alb ‘elf’ and ric ‘powerful’).
English: from the Middle English female personal name Albrey, Aubrey, a borrowing from Old French Albree, Aubree, Auberee (from ancient Germanic Albrad(a)).

English: variant of Abery, a habitational name from a local pronunciation of Avebury, Wiltshire. The placename derives from Old English burh ‘stronghold, fortified place’, with an uncertain first element, possibly the Old English personal name Afa.

variants.name: Auberry
meanings: English: variant of   Aubrey  .

variants.name: Awbrey
meanings: English: variant of   Aubrey  .

variants.name: Albury
meanings: habitational name from one or other of various places called Albury in Hertfordshire, Oxfordshire, and Surrey, from Old English (e)ald ‘old’ + byrig, dative of burh ‘stronghold’.
variant of   Aubrey  .
English:

variants.name: Aubry
meanings: Some characteristic forenames:  French Marcel, Michel, Pierre, Emile, Gaston, Germaine, Jacques, Jean Claude, Jean Michel, Jean-Michel, Luce, Stephane.
French: from the ancient Germanic personal name Alberic composed of the elements alb ‘elf’ and ric ‘powerful’. Compare Aubrey and Obrey .
French Canadian: altered form of Irish O'Brennan, an Anglicized form of Ó Braonáin (see Brennan 2).

en.lifeSummary: When Riwallon de Vitré, Vicarius de Vitré, Lord of Vitré and Aubroy was born in 0980, in Vitré, Ille-et-Vilaine, Brittany, France, his father, Martin de Rennes, was 42 and his mother, Salomé de León, was 43. He married Génergaude d'Aubrey de la Vicaire from 0975 to 1005, in Vitré-Est, Rennes, Ille-et-Vilaine, Brittany, France. They were the parents of at least 2 sons. He died in 1040, in France, at the age of 60.

fr.lifeSummary: Lorsque Riwallon de Vitré, Vicarius de Vitré, Lord of Vitré and Aubroy est né en 0980, à Vitré, Ille-et-Vilaine, Bretagne, France, son père, Martin de Rennes, avait 42 ans et sa mère, Salomé de León, avait 43 ans. Il a épousé Génergaude d'Aubrey de la Vicaire du 0975 au 1005, à Vitré-Est, Rennes, Ille-et-Vilaine, Bretagne, France. Ils ont eu au moins 2 fils. Il est décédé en 1040, à France, à l’âge de 60 ans.

de.lifeSummary: Als Riwallon de Vitré, Vicarius de Vitré, Lord of Vitré and Aubroy 0980 in Vitré, Ille-et-Vilaine, Bretagne, Frankreich geboren wurde, war sein Vater Martin de Rennes 42 und seine Mutter Salomé de León 43. Er hat von 0975 bis 1005 in Vitré-Est, Rennes, Ille-et-Vilaine, Bretagne, Frankreich Génergaude d'Aubrey de la Vicaire geheiratet. Sie hatten mindestens 2 Söhne. Er starb 1040 im Alter von 60 Jahren in Frankreich.

it.lifeSummary: Quando Riwallon de Vitré, Vicarius de Vitré, Lord of Vitré and Aubroy è nato il nel 0980 nel Vitré, Ille-et-Vilaine, Bretagne, Francia, il suo padre, Martin de Rennes, aveva 42 anni e il suo madre, Salomé de León, aveva 43 anni. Lui sposato Génergaude d'Aubrey de la Vicaire da 0975 a 1005, nel Vitré-Est, Rennes, Ille-et-Vilaine, Bretagne, Francia. Erano genitori di almeno 2 figli. Morì nel 1040, nel Francia, all'età di 60 anni.

ja.Vicaire, Ille-et-Vilaine, Bretagne, Fran: フランスブレタグンイレ-エト-ヴィレアイン
ja.Fourgeres, Rennes, Ille-et-Vilaine, Bret: フランスブレタグンイレ-エト-ヴィレアインレンス
ja.Vitre, Brittany, France: フランスブレタグンイレ-エト-ヴィレアインヴィトルe
ja.lifeSummary: Riwallon de Vitré, Vicarius de Vitré, Lord of Vitré and Aubroyが0980年にフランスブレタグンイレ-エト-ヴィレアインヴィトルeで生まれた時，父Martin de Rennesは42歳，母Salomé de Leónは43歳であった。から0975年まで1005年にフランスブレタグンイレ-エト-ヴィレアインレンスヴィトルe-エストでGénergaude d'Aubrey de la Vicaireと結婚した。彼らは少なくとも2人の息子の親であった。彼は1040年にフランスで60歳で死去した。

ko.lifeSummary: Riwallon de Vitré, Vicarius de Vitré, Lord of Vitré and Aubroy(이)가 0980년 프랑스 브레타그니 이레-트-빌레이인 비트e에서 태어났을 때, 그의 아버지 Martin de Rennes(은)는 42세였고, 그의 어머니 Salomé de León(은)는 43세였다. 그는 0975년 부터 1005년 까지 프랑스 브레타그니 이레-트-빌레이인 렌스 비트e-스트에서 Génergaude d'Aubrey de la Vicaire(와)과 결혼했다. 그들은 적어도 두 명의 아들을 두었다. 그는 1040년 프랑스에서 60세의 나이로 사망했다.

pt.lifeSummary: Quando Riwallon de Vitré, Vicarius de Vitré, Lord of Vitré and Aubroy nasceu em 0980, em Vitré, Ille-et-Vilaine, Bretagne, França, seu pai, Martin de Rennes, tinha 42 anos e sua mãe, Salomé de León, tinha 43 anos. Ele casou-se com Génergaude d'Aubrey de la Vicaire de 0975 a 1005, em Vitré-Est, Rennes, Ille-et-Vilaine, Bretagne, França. Eles tiveram pelo menos 2 filhos. Ele faleceu em 1040, em França, com 60 anos.

ru.lifeSummary: Когда Riwallon de Vitré, Vicarius de Vitré, Lord of Vitré and Aubroy родился в 0980 г. в местности витрe, илле-ет-вилеин, бретагн, Франция, его отцу по имени Martin de Rennes было 42 года, а матери, которую звали Salomé de León, 43. Он женился на женщине по имени Génergaude d'Aubrey de la Vicaire с 0975 по 1005 в местности витрe-ест, реннесь, илле-ет-вилеин, бретагн, Франция. У них было по крайней мере 2 сына. Он умер в 1040 г. в местности Франция в возрасте 60 лет.

es.lifeSummary: Cuando Riwallon de Vitré, Vicarius de Vitré, Lord of Vitré and Aubroy nació en 0980, en Vitré, Ille-et-Vilaine, Bretagne, Francia, su papá, Martin de Rennes, tenía 42 años y su mamá, Salomé de León, tenía 43 años. Se casó con Génergaude d'Aubrey de la Vicaire desde 0975 hasta 1005, en Vitré-Est, Rennes, Ille-et-Vilaine, Bretagne, Francia. Fueron padres de por lo menos 2 hijos. Murió en 1040, en Francia, a la edad de 60 años.
